args: AAPL.O MSFT.O GOOGL.O AMZN.O META.O NVDA.O TSLA.O
note: 7-name mega-cap tech watchlist (the SKILL.md usage example). Space-separated symbols, default weeks=8. Expect a Watchlist Summary table with per-symbol total score + score change, Alerts ranked by magnitude for any movers, Stable Names for the rest. Surveillance shape; no weights, no macro, no house view.

4-name cross-sector watchlist with explicit weeks=8 (tests the typed-int weeks param). Fewer names, broader sectors -> fewer correlated movers; exercises the same summary/alerts/actions structure on a smaller, more stable list.
